subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter from thy honoured self hath been received, and its contents brought the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه آنجناب وصول یافت و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گشت که
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom
